reviews.comment:
El día sábado 30/3 tipo 17hs pasamos por la YPF dolores d al lado del acá, la verdad el chico y la chica q nos atendieron dentro del shop unos genios. Todo limpio el lugar, nos atendieron rápido nos comentaron sobre las actividades de la ciudad de dolores ya q les habiamos dicho q habíamos ido a las termas. Nos contaron sobre la fiesta de la guitarra q se realiza a principio de marzo. Y hasta nos pusieron el partido de boca en la tele. Una maravilla el recibimiento. Por más gente así🙌🏻🙌🏻🙌🏻

(Translated by Google)
On Saturday, March 30th, around 5 PM, we stopped by the YPF gas station in Dolores, right next to our place. Honestly, the guy and girl who helped us inside the shop were fantastic. The place was spotless, they served us quickly, and they told us about the activities in the city of Dolores since we'd mentioned we'd been to the hot springs. They told us about the guitar festival that takes place at the beginning of March. And they even put on the Boca Juniors game for us on TV! The welcome was wonderful. We need more people like that! 🙌🏻🙌🏻🙌🏻
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEeDlMTXVRRRAB
